allow: PowerShell(foreach \($port in 8000,3000\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { taskkill /PID $_ /F 2>&1 | Out-Null } } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; "ports cleared")
